description_long: This is a modern, compact rifle with a sleek black finish, featuring a cylindrical suppressor attached to the end of its barrel. The rifle has a curved detachable magazine, a prominent trigger guard, and a pistol-style grip for ergonomic handling. Its stock is a minimalist, skeletonized design, likely made for lightweight maneuverability and quick deployment. The upper receiver is smooth, with a simple set of iron sights mounted along the top. The overall construction appears to be primarily metal, with some polymer components for the grip and stock. The rifle's design suggests it is intended for tactical or urban use, prioritizing portability and reduced sound signature.
description: A compact black rifle with a suppressor, curved magazine, and skeletonized stock, designed for tactical use. Features a sleek metal body with iron sights and ergonomic grip.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, including the suppressor, curved magazine, and skeletonized stock.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular suppressor opening and the narrow profile of the rifle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the magazine, stock, and upper receiver details from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the stock and the alignment of the barrel and receiver.
